mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(amount AS CHAR) AS amount, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS time FROM tb_wallet_payment WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY create_time DESC
